long_description:
[STGSRE] Multiple Storage Agent Pods Not Ready - Alert-ID: STG-BLK-SYSDIG-327 in mzone717:N/A is Triggered

TIP Runbook URL: https://pages.github.ibm.com/cloudlab/internal-docs/stg-blk-sysdig-204-initial-zonal-storage-agent-pod-unavailable.html 
TIP Situation: Observed Multiple Storage Agent Pods Not Ready
TIP Console: toc
TIP CRN: crn:v1:::is-volume:::mzone717:workloadname:storage-agent
TIP Short Description: Observed Multiple Storage Agent Pods Not Ready

Event Generated:

Severity:         Medium
Metric:
    (sum(kube_pod_status_ready{condition="false", kube_workload_name=~"storage-agent", kube_cluster_name !~ "^us-south-ngdc-test-staging01.*"}) by (kube_cluster_name)) >= 3 = 30
Segment:
    kube_cluster_name = 'mzone717'

Time:             12/03/2025 04:22 AM UTC
State:            Triggered
Notification URL: https://us-south.monitoring.cloud.ibm.com:443/api/oauth/openid/IBM/2c4a1985f9d5c10bd4842d2d3989088e/5f9d2351-5c34-4af7-b7d7-ff987623cc0f?redirectRoute=%2Fevents%2Fnotifications%2Fl%3A2419200%2F179343991%2Fdetails

------

Triggered by Alert:

Type:         Prometheus
Name:         [STGSRE] Multiple Storage Agent Pods Not Ready
Description:  Multiple Storage Agent pods are not ready in the cluster
Team:         Monitor Operations
Scope:
    Everywhere
Alert When:   (sum(kube_pod_status_ready{condition="false", kube_workload_name=~"storage-agent", kube_cluster_name !~ "^us-south-ngdc-test-staging01.*"}) by (kube_cluster_name)) >= 3
Duration: 30 m
